entity.summary: Decentralized foreign-exchange and stablecoin trading protocol using an AMM bonding curve optimized for fiat-backed stablecoins, with swaps, liquidity pools, liquidity mining, governance, and live protocol applications.
entity.notes: Current first-party website and documentation identify DFX Finance as a decentralized exchange/FX protocol for fiat-backed stablecoins and document AMM swaps, bonding-curve execution, liquidity provision, liquidity mining, contracts, and governance. Current v3 application endpoints are reachable. HEI models V2/V3 as versions under one DFX Finance entity.

evidence.title: DFX Finance
evidence.notes: Current first-party website identifies DFX as an Ethereum-based decentralized exchange protocol and crypto FX trading protocol optimized for fiat-backed stablecoins, with bonding-curve trading and live app links.

evidence.title: DFX Finance Documentation
evidence.notes: First-party documentation describes DFX as a decentralized foreign-exchange protocol for fiat-backed stablecoins and documents AMM swaps, dynamically adjusted bonding curves, liquidity providers, liquidity mining, smart contracts, governance, audits, and protocol links.

evidence.title: DFX Finance v3 application
evidence.notes: Current first-party DFX Finance v3 application endpoint is reachable at review time and is linked from the official website as the live protocol application.
